fieldValues.value: RFC-008: Heterogeneous ContainerSubset Sections — typeFilter and typeDispatch

`typeDispatch` on `DocumentSection` + `typeFilter` on `container-subset` source (both `ext:views-l2`).

<!-- srs-integration:v1
ext:views-l2
schema:document-view.json
-->

Adds two backward-compatible optional fields under `ext:views-l2` — `typeDispatch` on `DocumentSection` (per-type L1 view selection) and `typeFilter` on the `container-subset` source — to allow heterogeneous cross-type sections that preserve `precedes` reading order. Full text: rfcs/rfc-008-heterogeneous-container-subset-sections.md.
